name: 2024 Haaland vs Mbappe at their clubs
question: Is Erling Haaland more valuable to Manchester City than Kylian Mbappe is to Real Madrid?
expectedRationaleShape: Should cite Haaland's irreplaceability under a struggling City (Guardiola quote + on/off scoring rate), Mbappe's contested integration into Madrid's system (Lowe scout note), and rate Haaland higher on the load-bearing dimension despite both being elite producers.
notes: Worked example for framework authors and auditors. Synthetic dossier approximating 2024-25 half-season. The interesting feature: both players have similar transfer-market valuations (€180M each), so the framework cannot fall back on market price as a tiebreaker — it has to actually weigh irreplaceability and system-fit, which is the point.

match_reports.excerpt: Two goals in a 2-1 derby win. Both from low expected-goal positions — the kind of finishing that has carried City through a structurally rough season. Took 6 shots, completed only 14 passes.
Scored once in a 4-0 loss. Isolated for stretches as City's midfield collapsed under Spurs' press. The goal was a poacher's finish from a Doku cross.

manager_quotes.quote: Erling carries us. Without his goals we would be eighth, maybe ninth. That is the truth right now.

scout_notes.author: Sam McGuire (Total Football Analysis)
scout_notes.note: Haaland's xG per 90 (0.85) leads the Premier League by a wide margin. His non-shot involvement remains low — he is fundamentally a finisher in a system that creates for him. In a struggling City, his irreplaceability is the highest it's been: City scoring rate drops 38% in his off-minutes this season.

Erling Haaland.context_notes: Contract to 2034 (extended summer 2024), no realistic exit pressure. Brief knock in March 2024 (~3 weeks out), otherwise fully fit. City's rough season has if anything increased his relative importance.

match_reports.excerpt: Scored, assisted Vinicius, and was visibly settling into Ancelotti's system. Started central, drifted left in possession. Best individual display of his Madrid career to date.
Quiet game; missed a clear chance and went off at 70 with the team chasing the game. Pundits questioned whether the system around Vinicius leaves him a clear role.

manager_quotes.quote: Kylian is adjusting. The numbers will come. Real Madrid is not a club where you arrive and dominate from week one — but he will dominate.

scout_notes.author: Sid Lowe
scout_notes.note: Madrid's system is built around Vinicius on the left and Bellingham as a half-attacker. Mbappe's arrival has created friction — overlapping zones with Vinicius, fewer transitions to run into than at PSG. His ceiling is enormous but his current value to THIS Madrid side is contested.

Kylian Mbappe.context_notes: Free transfer in summer 2024. 5-year contract. Hamstring injury in September (3 weeks out). Vinicius remains the system's primary attacker; Bellingham the second focal point — Mbappe is, today, the third option in attacking sequences despite being the most expensive arrival.

evidence.context_notes: Half-season snapshot. The interpretive contest: Haaland is more obviously the load-bearing star of his (struggling) club; Mbappe arrived as Real Madrid's headline signing but has not yet displaced the existing system. The framework would be expected to favor Haaland on irreplaceability + production-vs-team-output even though both have similar transfer-market valuations.
